about.summary: Data-driven analyst with experience transforming raw data into actionable business intelligence. Passionate about using rigorous statistical methods and modern data tools to solve complex business problems.
highlights: Skilled in data analysis, visualization, and reporting
Experience with SQL, Python, and BI tools like Tableau and Power BI
Strong ability to communicate insights to non-technical stakeholders
Committed to continuous learning and staying current with data trends
